headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -84.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 32% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 140 quotes and 102 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.
• While frustration levels dropped from yesterday's peak, they remain well above the typical range for this period.
• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's low, while optimism continues struggling in negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
